hotspot.snippet:
def _quiescence(self, alpha, beta, ply):
        """Quiescence search: only captures and promotions."""
        board = self.board
        info = self.info

        info.nodes += 1
        self._check_time()
        if info.stopped:
            return 0

        if ply > info.seldepth:
            info.seldepth = ply

        stand_pat = evaluate(board)

        if stand_pat >= beta:
            return beta

        # Delta pruning
        BIG_DELTA = PIECE_VALUES[QUEEN] + 200
        if stand_pat + BIG_DELTA < alpha:
            return alpha

        if stand_pat > alpha:
            alpha = stand_pat

        moves = gen_captures(board)
        # Simple ordering: MVV-LVA
        scored = []
        for move in moves:
            to_sq = move_to(move)
            from_sq = move_from(move)
            victim_mb = board.mailbox[to_sq]
            attacker_mb = board.mailbox[from_sq]
            victim_pt = victim_mb & 7 if victim_mb else PAWN
            attacker_pt = attacker_mb & 7 if attacker_mb else PAWN
            score = PIECE_VALUES[victim_pt] * 10 - PIECE_VALUES[attacker_pt]
            if is_promotion(move):
                score += 5000
            scored.append((score, move))
        scored.sort(reverse=True)

        for _, move in scored:
            # SEE-like delta pruning
            to_sq = move_to(move)
            victim_mb = board.mailbox[to_sq]
            if victim_mb:
                capture_value = PIECE_VALUES[victim_mb & 7]
            elif move_flags(move) == 5:  # EP
                capture_value = PIECE_VALUES[PAWN]
            else:
                capture_value = 0

            if stand_pat + capture_value + 200 < alpha and not is_promotion(move):
                continue

            board.make_move(move)
            if board.is_attacked(board.king_sq[board.side ^ 1], board.side):
                board.unmake_move()
                continue

            score = -self._quiescence(-beta, -alpha, ply + 1)
            board.unmake_move()

            if info.stopped:
                return 0

            if score >= beta:
                return beta
            if score > alpha:
                alpha = score

        return alpha

hotspot.snippet:
def quiescence(ply, alpha, beta)
      @nodes += 1

      if (@nodes & (CHECK_INTERVAL - 1)) == 0
        if @time_manager.hard_time_up?
          @stop = true
          return 0
        end
      end

      in_check = @board.in_check?

      if in_check
        stand_pat = -INFINITY
      else
        stand_pat = Evaluation.evaluate(@board)
        return stand_pat if stand_pat >= beta
        return alpha if stand_pat + 975 < alpha # Delta pruning
        alpha = stand_pat if stand_pat > alpha
      end

      if in_check
        moves = MoveGenerator.generate(@board)
      else
        moves = MoveGenerator.generate(@board, captures_only: true)
      end

      order_moves_qsearch(moves)
      legal_count = 0

      moves.each do |move|
        if !in_check && move.capture?
          captured_val = PIECE_VALUES[ChessEngine.piece_type(move.captured)] || 0

          # Delta pruning per move
          if stand_pat + captured_val + 200 < alpha
            next unless move.promotion?
          end

          # SEE pruning: skip losing captures
          attacker_val = PIECE_VALUES[ChessEngine.piece_type(move.piece)] || 0
          if attacker_val > captured_val
            next if Attack.see(@board, move) < 0
          end
        end

        next unless @board.make_move_if_legal(move)
        legal_count += 1

        score = -quiescence(ply + 1, -beta, -alpha)
        @board.unmake_move(move)

        return 0 if @stop

        if score > alpha
          alpha = score
          return alpha if score >= beta
        end
      end

hotspot.snippet:
def quiescence(position, alpha, beta, deadline_ms, ply, qply)
      return 0 if stopped_or_timed_out?(deadline_ms)

      if position.in_check?(position.side_to_move)
        evasions = position.legal_moves
        return -MATE_SCORE + ply if evasions.empty?
        return alpha if qply >= QUIESCENCE_MAX_PLY

        ordered_moves(position, evasions, ply: ply, tt_move: nil).each do |move|
          break if stopped_or_timed_out?(deadline_ms)

          child = position.make_move(move)
          score = -quiescence(child, -beta, -alpha, deadline_ms, ply + 1, qply + 1)
          return 0 if @timed_out
          return beta if score >= beta

          alpha = [alpha, score].max
        end

        return alpha
      end

hotspot.snippet:
Fixpoint quiesce (pos : Position) (alpha beta : int) (qdepth : nat) : int :=
  match qdepth with
  | O => evaluate pos
  | S qdepth' =>
    let stand_pat := evaluate pos in
    if leb beta stand_pat then stand_pat
    else
      (* Delta pruning: if even capturing a queen can't raise us to alpha, give up *)
      if ltb (add stand_pat delta_margin) alpha then stand_pat
      else
        let a := if ltb alpha stand_pat then stand_pat else alpha in
        let captures := gen_capture_moves pos in
        let fix go (mvs : list Move) (cur_a : int) (fuel : nat) : int :=
          match fuel with
          | O => cur_a
          | S fuel' =>
            match mvs with
            | nil => cur_a
            | m :: rest =>
              let new_pos := make_move pos m in
              let score := negate_score (quiesce new_pos (negate_score beta) (negate_score cur_a) qdepth') in
              if leb beta score then score
              else
                let na := if ltb cur_a score then score else cur_a in
                go rest na fuel'
            end
          end
        in go captures a 256%nat
  end.

hotspot.snippet:
let rec quiescence ctx pos alpha beta qdepth ply =
  should_stop ctx;
  let stand = evaluate pos in
  if qdepth <= 0 then stand
  else if stand >= beta then beta
  else
    let a = ref (max alpha stand) in
    let caps = order_moves pos (legal_capture_moves pos) in
    let rec loop = function
      | [] -> !a
      | m :: tl ->
          let captured = E.make_move pos m in
          let score = - (quiescence ctx pos (-beta) (- !a) (qdepth - 1) (ply + 1)) in
          E.unmake_move pos m captured;
          if score >= beta then beta
          else (
            if score > !a then a := score;
            loop tl)
    in
    loop caps

    let legal := legalMoves pos
    if legal.isEmpty then
      if isInCheck pos pos.sideToMove then
        (-MATE + Int.ofNat ply, 1)
      else
        (0, 1)
    else if isInCheck pos pos.sideToMove then
      Id.run do
        let mut a := alpha
        let mut best : Int := -INF
        let mut nodes : Nat := 1
        for m in orderMoves pos legal do
          let (childScore, childNodes) :=
            quiescence (makeMove pos m) (-beta) (-a) (ply + 1) (qDepth - 1)
          nodes := nodes + childNodes
          let score := -childScore
          if score > best then
            best := score
          if score > a then
            a := score
          if a >= beta then
            return (beta, nodes)
        return (best, nodes)
    else
      let standPat := eval pos
      if standPat >= beta then
        (beta, 1)
      else
        Id.run do
          let mut a := if standPat > alpha then standPat else alpha
          let mut best := standPat
          let mut nodes : Nat := 1
          let tactical := legal.filter (fun m => isTacticalMove pos m)
          for m in tactical do
            let gainBound := tacticalGainUpperBound pos m
            if standPat + gainBound + QDeltaMargin < a then
              pure ()
            else
              let (childScore, childNodes) :=
                quiescence (makeMove pos m) (-beta) (-a) (ply + 1) (qDepth - 1)
              nodes := nodes + childNodes
              let score := -childScore
              if score > best then
                best := score
              if score > a then
                a := score
              if a >= beta then
                return (beta, nodes)
          return (best, nodes)

hotspot.snippet:
LINKAGE SECTION.
       COPY "copybooks/types.cpy".
       01 L-ALPHA                PIC S9(9) COMP-5.
       01 L-BETA                 PIC S9(9) COMP-5.
       01 L-SS.
          COPY "copybooks/searchstate.cpy".
       01 L-OUT                  PIC S9(9) COMP-5.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING GAME-STATE L-ALPHA L-BETA L-SS L-OUT.
           IF SS-STOP = 1
               MOVE 0 TO L-OUT
               GOBACK
           END-IF

           ADD 1 TO SS-NODES
           IF SS-TIME-LIMIT-CS > 0
               SUBTRACT 1 FROM SS-TIME-CHECK
               IF SS-TIME-CHECK <= 0
                   MOVE 2048 TO SS-TIME-CHECK
                   CALL "TIMEUTIL" USING NOW-CS
                   COMPUTE ELAPSED = NOW-CS - SS-START-CS
                   IF ELAPSED >= SS-TIME-LIMIT-CS
                       MOVE 1 TO SS-STOP
                       MOVE 0 TO L-OUT
                       GOBACK
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-IF

           CALL "EVAL" USING GAME-STATE STANDPAT
           IF STANDPAT >= L-BETA
               MOVE L-BETA TO L-OUT
               GOBACK
           END-IF
           IF STANDPAT > L-ALPHA
               MOVE STANDPAT TO L-ALPHA
           END-IF

           *> Delta pruning: if even a queen gain can't raise alpha, skip captures.
           IF (STANDPAT + 950) < L-ALPHA
               MOVE L-ALPHA TO L-OUT
               GOBACK
           END-IF

           MOVE 1 TO CAP-ONLY
           CALL "MOVEGEN" USING GAME-STATE LS-LIST CAP-ONLY

           *> Score captures (MVV-LVA) for quiescence ordering
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > ML-COUNT OF LS-LIST
               PERFORM SCORE-Q-MOVE
           END-PERFORM

           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > ML-COUNT OF LS-LIST OR SS-STOP = 1
               PERFORM PICK-BEST-Q

               MOVE ML-FROM OF LS-LIST(I)  TO M-FROM OF LS-MOVE
               MOVE ML-TO OF LS-LIST(I)    TO M-TO OF LS-MOVE
               MOVE ML-PROMO OF LS-LIST(I) TO M-PROMO OF LS-MOVE
               MOVE ML-FLAGS OF LS-LIST(I) TO M-FLAGS OF LS-MOVE
               MOVE 0 TO M-SCORE OF LS-MOVE

               CALL "MAKEMOVE" USING GAME-STATE LS-MOVE OK
               IF OK = 1
                   MOVE 0 TO CHILD-SCORE
                   COMPUTE CHILD-ALPHA = 0 - L-BETA
                   COMPUTE CHILD-BETA  = 0 - L-ALPHA
                   CALL "QUIESCE" USING GAME-STATE CHILD-ALPHA CHILD-BETA L-SS CHILD-SCORE
                   COMPUTE CHILD-SCORE = 0 - CHILD-SCORE
                   CALL "UNMAKEMOVE" USING GAME-STATE LS-MOVE

                   IF SS-STOP = 1
                       MOVE 0 TO L-OUT
                       GOBACK
                   END-IF

                   IF CHILD-SCORE > L-ALPHA
                       MOVE CHILD-SCORE TO L-ALPHA
                       IF L-ALPHA >= L-BETA
                           MOVE L-BETA TO L-OUT
                           GOBACK
                       END-IF
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM

           MOVE L-ALPHA TO L-OUT
           GOBACK.

hotspot.snippet:
procedure quiescence(pos, alpha, beta, ply)
  local stand, moves, m, child, score

  g_nodes +:= 1
  if out_of_time() = 1 then {
    g_abort_search := 1
    return evaluate(pos)
  }

  stand := evaluate(pos)
  if stand >= beta then return beta
  if stand > alpha then alpha := stand

  moves := generate_pseudo_moves(pos, 1)
  order_moves(pos, moves, ply, &null)

  every m := !moves do {
    child := apply_move(pos, m)
    if /child then next

    score := -quiescence(child, -beta, -alpha, ply + 1)
    if g_abort_search = 1 then return 0

    if score >= beta then return beta
    if score > alpha then alpha := score
  }

  return alpha
end

 →NEXT

 MOVES←MOVES,⊂MOVE
NEXT:
 I←I+1
 →LOOP
ALL:
 MOVES←LEGAL
DONE:

context.text: """Compute pdflatex timeout from UCI go parameters.
The TeX engine has fixed computation cost per move (no iterative deepening,
no way to stop early).  Depth-3 + quiescence typically takes 1-13s depending
on position complexity and game length (move replay overhead).  The timeout
must be generous enough for the search to complete; killing pdflatex early
produces an illegal 0000 which is an instant loss.
# deepening) — it either completes in 1-15s or returns nothing useful.

hotspot.snippet:
\def\mm@quiesce{%
  \evaluate
  \mm@standpat=\evalscore\relax
  % Stand-pat cutoff: standpat >= beta
  \ifnum\mm@standpat<\mm@qbeta\relax
    % standpat < beta: continue searching captures
    \ifnum\mm@standpat>\mm@qalpha\relax
      \mm@qalpha=\mm@standpat\relax
    \fi
    \generatelegal
    \mm@copycapturesonly
    \mm@qtotal=\mm@copycnt\relax
    \ifnum\mm@qtotal=0
      \global\mm@retval=\mm@qalpha\relax
    \else
      \mm@qcutofffalse
      \mm@qidx=1\relax
      \mm@qloop
    \fi
  \else
    % standpat >= beta: return beta
    \global\mm@retval=\mm@qbeta\relax
  \fi
}
